title: Danger zone
note: Delete your scheduling and data. Choose a scope, then a level. Everything here is permanent and
clearScheduleMsg: Removes planned habits for {{scope}}. Your habits and repeat rules stay. This cannot be undone.
clearRulesMsg: Removes planned habits AND stops repeats for {{scope}} across the whole app. Habits themselves stay. This cannot be undone.
deleteAllMsg: Permanently deletes the habits for {{scope}} AND their session/analytics history. This cannot be undone.
rulesCleared: Schedule and repeat rules cleared for {{scope}}.
